symlink-out-of-home — read-side containment check.

Setup wiring (see fixtures_test.go):
  1. Write settings.json payload to a per-test outside-HOME path
     (a second t.TempDir(), which is a sibling of HOME on disk).
  2. Symlink ~/.claude/settings.json → outside-HOME path.

Expected Import result:
  errors.Is(err, claudecode.ErrOutsideHome) == true

This case is an error-only fixture: no expected/*.json goldens are
compared. The error-only.txt marker file records the expected
error identifier so runFixtureCase asserts errors.Is against it.
